title: Marchantia genotyping (quick and dirty genomic DNA extraction)
author: Eftychis Frangedakis

steps_raw.instruction: Take small pieces (3x3 mm) of thalli from individual plants and place in a 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube (A in Figure).
Place the tube(s) at 80 °C for 10 min.
Add 380 μL of sterile water to each tube (D in Figure).

Use 5 μl aliquot of the extract as a template for PCR using preferably the KOD Hot start polymerase. We found KOD to be more reliable amplyfing fragments from a crude genomic DNA extract such as the one used here.
Add 100 μl genotyping buffer (B in Figure).
Crush with an autoclaved micro-pestle (C in Figure).
Check PCR products on a 1.5% (w/v) agarose gel.
